sections.title: Right-Click Trade option with more than 5,000 Pieces of Eight

lines.speaker: Honest Jimmy
lines.text: Are you here for the stuff?

lines.speaker: Honest Jimmy
lines.text: You here for the...stuff?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What stuff?

lines.speaker: Honest Jimmy
lines.text: Look [miss/pal] I got the goods if you have the cash.

lines.speaker: Honest Jimmy
lines.text: We talkin' the same language yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What stuff is this again?

lines.speaker: Honest Jimmy
lines.text: The sort of stuff you use in brewing.

lines.speaker: Honest Jimmy
lines.text: The sort of stuff the Cooking Guild banned last year.

lines.speaker: Honest Jimmy
lines.text: The sort of stuff that (if added to a vat of brewing ingredients just before the hops) has a higher chance of producin' a mature batch of whatever ale you wanted to make.

lines.speaker: Honest Jimmy
lines.text: That sort of stuff.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What was that bit about adding it to something?

lines.speaker: Honest Jimmy
lines.text: I said, it's the sort of Stuff you add to a brewing vat after you have put the water and barley malt in.

lines.speaker: Honest Jimmy
lines.text: THEN you add the sort of stuff I'm talking about, followed by the hops and the yeast.

lines.speaker: Honest Jimmy
lines.text: Then, when whatever you are making brews it will have a higher chance of being a mature batch of ale.

lines.speaker: Honest Jimmy
lines.text: That clear enough for you or am I going to have to start drawin' pictures on the wall of the hut?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: Honest Jimmy
lines.text: Then sling yer 'ook!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I hear you are the man to talk to about maps.

lines.speaker: Honest Jimmy
lines.text: I might be, you got something for me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Like what?

lines.speaker: Honest Jimmy
lines.text: Like...5000 Pieces of Eight?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I might have 5000 Pieces of Eight with your name on them if you have a map for me.

lines.speaker: Honest Jimmy
lines.text: Look, I might have a little something for you for that amount of cash, but I'll have to check.

lines.speaker: Honest Jimmy
lines.text: You sure you want in on this?

lines.speaker: Honest Jimmy
lines.text: Ok, there you go, now try and keep this to yourself, ok?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: Honest Jimmy
lines.text: Then sling yer 'ook!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, no but...

lines.speaker: Honest Jimmy
lines.text: Look, you want something or not?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: Honest Jimmy
lines.text: Then sling yer 'ook!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have no idea what you are talking about.

lines.speaker: Honest Jimmy
lines.text: Then sling yer 'ook!

sections.title: When using the right-click join-team option

lines.speaker: Honest Jimmy
lines.text: Sorry, no hats allowed. Shove it in the deposit box if you want to play.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why not?

lines.speaker: Honest Jimmy
lines.text: Cos it's one of the rules, you got a problem with rules?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I am sort of a pirate after all.

lines.speaker: Honest Jimmy
lines.text: Good answer!

lines.speaker: Honest Jimmy
lines.text: But still, no hats. They give you a hat to show what team you are on, and if you got a hat on, it might get nicked, see?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, ok.

lines.speaker: Honest Jimmy
lines.text: Might want to dump that stuff yer holdin'.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you mean?

lines.speaker: Honest Jimmy
lines.text: Well, if you are carrying anything in there, then it might get damaged. Burned up, that kind of thing.

lines.speaker: Honest Jimmy
lines.text: You might want to put it in the bank, nice and safe like.

lines.speaker: Honest Jimmy
lines.text: No cats.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you sure?

lines.speaker: Honest Jimmy
lines.text: Yep, they might get into the brew, and I know a few pirates that are allergic to them.

lines.speaker: Honest Jimmy
lines.text: Hah!

lines.speaker: Honest Jimmy
lines.text: You a good cook?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, not very...

lines.speaker: Honest Jimmy
lines.text: Then you don't get in. Cooking 40 or over, Cooking Guild regulations, if you catch my drift.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello?

lines.speaker: Honest Jimmy
lines.text: Huh, who's there?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's [player name]. I'm using my magic to communicate to you. Don't worry.

lines.speaker: Honest Jimmy
lines.text: Well, I'm not sayin' anything to anyone unless they have decent cookin' skills.

lines.speaker: Honest Jimmy
lines.text: I figured, seeing as I can see you over there! I don't make deals like this.

lines.speaker: Honest Jimmy
lines.text: The sooner you get out of my head the better. So, you here for the... information?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The information?

lines.speaker: Honest Jimmy
lines.text: Look [miss/pal], you interrupted me for a reason, you must be after something.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How much time till the next game of Trouble Brewing starts?

lines.speaker: Honest Jimmy
lines.text: Ah, that's information I can help yer with.

lines.speaker: Honest Jimmy
lines.text: A game is ready to start just as soon as there are enough people.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And how many people are there?

lines.speaker: Honest Jimmy
lines.text: There are [X] people on Dan's team, and [X] on San's. There needs to be one on each in order for a game to start!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, ok. Thanks.

lines.speaker: Honest Jimmy
lines.text: Anything else?

lines.speaker: Honest Jimmy
lines.text: There's a game on at the moment, and another will be starting in [X] minutes time!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, ok. Thanks.

lines.speaker: Honest Jimmy
lines.text: Anything else?

lines.speaker: Honest Jimmy
lines.text: A game has just ended, and another will be starting in [X] minutes time!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, ok. Thanks.

lines.speaker: Honest Jimmy
lines.text: Anything else?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How many people are waiting for a game to start?

lines.speaker: Honest Jimmy
lines.text: No-one's waiting at the moment. Perhaps you can get some people interested.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmmm... maybe.

lines.speaker: Honest Jimmy
lines.text: There [is/are]] [no one/one person/X people] on Dan's team...

lines.speaker: Honest Jimmy
lines.text: ... and there [is/are]] [no one/one person/X people] on San's team. Anything else?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have no idea what you are talking about.

lines.speaker: Honest Jimmy
lines.text: Then sling yer 'ook!
